subcodes.first_line: Render praise unto Him Who is the Purpose of the world, Who hath singled thee out through His wondrous favor and adorned thee with a glorious ornament [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد کن مقصود عالمرا که شما را بعنایت بدیعه اش مخصوص فرمود و بطرازی مزین نمود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for praise and gratitude
